## Description

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Open Atlas Racing
2. Select '...' dashboard
3. Do '...'
4. See the error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include screenshots if possible.

## Environment

- **OS**: Windows 10 / 11
- **Game**: F1 24 / F1 25 / Assetto Corsa
- **Browser**: Chrome / Edge / Firefox
- **Node.js version**: (run `node --version`)

## Additional Context

Any other information (error messages from the console, network tab, etc.).
